# Serika GIFs API

> Serika GIFs is a public GIF hosting and search platform. This document is a
> compact, complete reference written for LLMs and automated agents. Every
> endpoint, parameter, auth rule, and response shape needed to integrate is here.

Base URL: https://gifs.serika.dev/api
All responses are JSON. All timestamps are ISO 8601 UTC strings.

## Authentication

- Header (recommended): `X-API-Key: sgif_...`
- Header (alternative): `Authorization: Bearer sgif_...`
- Query param (discouraged): `?api_key=sgif_...`
- Public endpoints work without a key but share a low anonymous rate limit.
- Create keys at https://gifs.serika.dev/settings. Keys look like `sgif_<32 chars>`.

## Rate limits (requests per hour)

- Anonymous: 30
- Tier 1 (default for new keys): 1,000
- Tier 2: 10,000  (request upgrade)
- Tier 3: 100,000 (request upgrade)
- Tier 4: 1,000,000 (request upgrade)
- Tier 5: unlimited (strict guidelines apply)

Every response includes: `X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`,
`X-RateLimit-Reset` (unix seconds). On HTTP 429, honor `Retry-After` (seconds).

## Core object: Gif

```json
{
  "id": "clx123",
  "slug": "funny-cat",
  "title": "Funny Cat",
  "description": "optional",
  "url": "https://cdn.serika.dev/gifs/.../funny-cat.gif",
  "webmUrl": "https://.../funny-cat.webm",
  "thumbnailUrl": "https://.../funny-cat.webp",
  "width": 480,
  "height": 270,
  "fileSize": 1048576,
  "duration": 2.4,
  "source": "UPLOAD",         // UPLOAD | TENOR | GIPHY | KLIPY
  "isNsfw": false,
  "views": 1234,
  "favorites": 42,
  "tags": ["cat", "funny"],
  "user": { "id": "usr123", "username": "john", "avatar": null },
  "createdAt": "2026-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
}
```

## Endpoints

### GET /gifs — list & search GIFs (auth optional)
Query params:
- `page` integer, default 1
- `limit` integer, default 20, max 100
- `search` string — full-text over title, description, and tags
- `tag` string — filter by tag slug (e.g. `reaction`)
- `userId` string — filter by uploader
- `sort` one of `trending` (default), `newest`, `popular`, `most-viewed`, `random`
  - `trending` ranks by a time-decayed hotness score = log10(views + 4·favorites + 1) + freshness decay, so new and consistently-popular GIFs both surface.
- `timeRange` one of `all` (default), `day`, `week`, `month`
- `nsfw` one of `exclude` (default, SFW only), `include` (SFW + NSFW), `only` (NSFW only)

Response 200:
```json
{ "gifs": [Gif, ...], "pagination": { "page": 1, "limit": 20, "total": 150, "totalPages": 8 } }
```

### GET /gifs/{slug} — single GIF (auth none)
Response 200: `{ "gif": Gif }`. 404 if not found.

### POST /gifs — upload a GIF (auth required)
Content-Type: `multipart/form-data`. Fields:
- `file` (required) — image/gif, image/webp, video/mp4, or video/webm; max 50MB
- `title` (required) string
- `description` (optional) string
- `tags` (optional) comma-separated, max 10, e.g. `cat,funny`
- `isPublic` (optional) boolean, default true
- `isNsfw` (optional) boolean, default false — marks adult content; hidden from default listings
Response 200: `{ "success": true, "gif": { "id", "slug", "title", "url" } }`

### DELETE /gifs/{slug} — delete a GIF (auth required; owner or admin)
Response 200: `{ "success": true }`. 403 if not permitted.

### GET /collections — list collections (auth optional)
Query: `page`, `limit`, `userId`, `sort` (`popular` default, `newest`, `alphabetical`).
Response: `{ "collections": [{ "id", "name", "slug", "gifCount", "previewGifs": [...] }], "pagination": {...} }`

### POST /collections — create collection (auth required)
JSON body: `{ "name": "My Reactions", "description"?: string, "isPublic"?: true }`

### GET /collections/{id} — collection with its GIFs (auth optional)

### GET /favorites — list current user's favorites (auth required)
### POST /favorites — add favorite (auth required). JSON body: `{ "gifId": "clx123" }`
### DELETE /favorites?gifId=clx123 — remove favorite (auth required)

### GET /tags — list/search tags (auth none)
Query: `search` string, `limit` integer (default 50, max 100).
Response: `{ "tags": [{ "name", "slug", "count" }] }`

### GET /keys — list your API keys (auth required)
### POST /keys — create API key (auth required). JSON body: `{ "name": "My App" }` → starts at Tier 1.

### GET /auth/session — current session (auth optional) → `{ "user": {...} | null }`
### POST /auth/login — JSON `{ "email", "password" }`

### GET /stats/trending — site-wide trending stats (auth none)
Response: `{ "trendingToday", "totalViews", "favoritesToday", "growth": "+12%" }`

## Common errors
- 400 invalid input, 401 unauthenticated, 403 forbidden, 404 not found,
  429 rate limited (retry after `Retry-After` seconds), 500 server error.
Error body shape: `{ "error": "message" }`.

## Minimal examples

Search trending funny GIFs:
```bash
curl "https://gifs.serika.dev/api/gifs?search=funny&sort=trending&limit=10" \
  -H "X-API-Key: sgif_YOUR_KEY"
```

Upload:
```bash
curl -X POST "https://gifs.serika.dev/api/gifs" \
  -H "X-API-Key: sgif_YOUR_KEY" \
  -F "file=@cat.gif" -F "title=Funny Cat" -F "tags=cat,funny" -F "isNsfw=false"
```
